heading: Education on health information privacy
label: 17933 Education on health information privacy
notes: Effective DateSection effective 12 months after , except as otherwise specifically provided, see , set out as a note under .Feb. 17, 2009section 13423 of Pub. L. 111–5section 17931 of this title

children.heading: Regional office privacy advisors
children.label: a Regional office privacy advisors
children.text: Not later than 6 months after , the Secretary shall designate an individual in each regional office of the Department of Health and Human Services to offer guidance and education to covered entities, business associates, and individuals on their rights and responsibilities related to Federal privacy and security requirements for protected health information.February 17, 2009

children.heading: Education initiative on uses of health information
children.label: b Education initiative on uses of health information
children.text: Not later than 12 months after , the Office for Civil Rights within the Department of Health and Human Services shall develop and maintain a multi-faceted national education initiative to enhance public transparency regarding the uses of protected health information, including programs to educate individuals about the potential uses of their protected health information, the effects of such uses, and the rights of individuals with respect to such uses. Such programs shall be conducted in a variety of languages and present information in a clear and understandable manner.February 17, 2009
